name: rdc-debugger
description: RenderDoc/RDC GPU Debug 的 Codex plugin 包装层，要求先手动覆盖 common/ 与 tools/ 后再使用。

interface.longDescription: CLI-first Codex plugin bundle for RenderDoc/RDC GPU debugging. You still need to copy debugger/common and RDC-Agent-Tools into the plugin before validating and installing it.
defaultPrompt: Use $rdc-debugger to enter the RenderDoc/RDC GPU debugging workflow for this workspace.
Use $rdc-debugger to verify whether this render fix is correct.
